get.description: Get LSP server status

get.summary: DRE status and pending refactor plans
get.description: Return the current project's pending refactor plans plus DRE health information (graph node count, last-indexed timestamp, registered tool count). The TUI footer uses the plans count for its chip; the TUI sidebar uses the graph and tool fields to render the DRE section empty state so users can tell at a glance whether DRE is ready to use. Fields default to zero / null when the experimental DRE flag is off, so callers can poll unconditionally. The `graph` and `toolCount` fields were added in v2.3.6 - older clients ignore unknown fields and continue to work against the original `{ count, plans }` shape.
Get formatter status

get.summary: Get correlated diagnostics for a file
get.description: Return DRE cross-file root-cause correlations for a given file. Each entry maps an LSP error to a possible root-cause location in another file, with a confidence level and a symbol chain linking the error back to its origin. Returns an empty array when the DRE flag is off or no correlations are cached.

start.description: Startup script to run when creating a new workspace (worktree)

custom.description: Allow typing a custom answer (default: true)

ServerConfig.description: Server configuration for ax-code serve and web commands

hostname.description: Loopback hostname to listen on; network binds are disabled

cors.description: Additional loopback origins to allow for CORS

variant.description: Default model variant for this agent (applies only when using the agent's configured model).

description.description: Description of when to use the agent

hidden.description: Hide this subagent from the @ autocomplete menu (default: false, only applies to mode: subagent)

tier.description: Agent visibility tier: core (always shown in picker), specialist (expandable, accessed via @-mention), internal (hidden)

color.description: Hex color code (e.g., #FF5733) or theme color (e.g., primary)

steps.description: Maximum number of agentic iterations before forcing text-only response

enterpriseUrl.description: GitHub Enterprise URL for copilot authentication

setCacheKey.description: Enable promptCacheKey for this provider (default false)

anyOf.description: Timeout in milliseconds for requests to this provider. Default is 300000 (5 minutes). Set to false to disable timeout.
Disable timeout for this provider entirely.

chunkTimeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds between streamed SSE chunks for this provider. If no chunk arrives within this window, the request is aborted.

toolProfile.description: Tool surface for constrained local providers such as AX Engine. "core" keeps coding/file tools only; "full" exposes every enabled tool.

disabled.description: Disable this variant for the model

command.description: Command and arguments to run the MCP server

environment.description: Environment variables to set when running the MCP server

enabled.description: Enable or disable the MCP server on startup

timeout.description: Timeout in ms for MCP server requests. Defaults to 30000 (30 seconds) if not specified.

clientId.description: OAuth client ID. If not provided, dynamic client registration (RFC 7591) will be attempted.

clientSecret.description: OAuth client secret (if required by the authorization server)

scope.description: OAuth scopes to request during authorization

url.description: URL of the remote MCP server

enabled.description: Enable or disable the MCP server on startup

headers.description: Headers to send with the request

oauth.description: OAuth authentication configuration for the MCP server. Set to false to disable OAuth auto-detection.

timeout.description: Timeout in ms for MCP server requests. Defaults to 30000 (30 seconds) if not specified.

IsolationMode.description: Isolation mode: read-only blocks all mutations, workspace-write allows writes inside workspace only, full-access disables isolation

IsolationBackend.description: Isolation enforcement backend: app (portable tool checks, default), os (kernel sandbox for bash when available), auto (prefer os with app fallback)

network.description: Allow network access from tools. Defaults to false in read-only and workspace-write modes

protected.description: Additional paths relative to workspace root that are protected from writes. .git and .ax-code are always protected

$schema.description: JSON schema reference for configuration validation

urls.description: URLs to fetch skills from (e.g., https://example.com/.well-known/skills/)

snapshot.description: Enable or disable snapshot tracking. When false, filesystem snapshots are not recorded and undoing or reverting will not undo/redo file changes. Defaults to true.

autoupdate.description: Automatically update to the latest version. Set to true to auto-update, false to disable, or 'notify' to show update notifications

shell.description: Default shell to use for terminal and bash tool (e.g. /bin/bash, /usr/bin/zsh). Overrides $SHELL environment variable.

disabled_providers.description: Disable providers that are loaded automatically

enabled_providers.description: When set, ONLY these providers will be enabled. All other providers will be ignored

model.description: Model to use in the format of provider/model, eg openai/gpt-5

small_model.description: Small model to use for tasks like title generation in the format of provider/model

default_agent.description: Default agent to use when none is specified. Must be a primary agent. Falls back to 'build' if not set or if the specified agent is invalid.

username.description: Custom username to display in conversations instead of system username

provider.description: Custom provider configurations and model overrides

anyOf.description: MCP server config. Tools surface as permission keys `<server>_<tool>` — use the top-level `permission` map (with wildcards) to allow / deny them, or scope them per agent via `agent.<name>.permission`.

instructions.description: Additional instruction files or patterns to include

super_long.description: Enable Super-Long supervised long-run mode (default: on for models with a 64k+ context window, thinking, and prompt caching — e.g. Qwen 3.7 Max/Plus; off otherwise)

duration_hours.description: Runtime ceiling for a Super-Long run in hours (default and hard maximum: 72)

ttl_days.description: Auto-prune sessions older than this many days (default: 30)

auto_prune.description: Automatically prune expired sessions on startup (default: true)

max_steps.description: Maximum agentic steps per session turn before stopping (default: 500)

max_continuations.description: In autonomous mode, how many times to auto-continue after hitting step limit (default: 3, 0 to disable)

max_total_steps.description: Hard ceiling on cumulative steps across ALL auto-continuations, including active goals and Super-Long runs (default: max_steps × (max_continuations + 1); Super-Long default: max_steps × 40)

max_todo_retries.description: In autonomous mode, how many times to auto-continue when todos remain pending after the model stops (default: 10, 0 to disable)

routing.description: Specialist agent auto-routing and message-complexity routing settings

disable.description: Disable automatic specialist agent routing based on message keywords. Default: false.

mode.description: @deprecated Routing mode is no longer used. Field accepted for backwards compatibility but ignored.

auto_switch.description: @deprecated Use routing.disable instead. Field accepted for backwards compatibility but ignored.

llm.description: Enable LLM-based message-complexity classification so simple queries use a small/fast model. Default: true.

auto.description: Enable automatic compaction when context is full (default: true)

prune.description: Enable pruning of old tool outputs (default: true)

reserved.description: Token buffer for compaction. Leaves enough window to avoid overflow during compaction.

interceptOpen.description: Intercept browser-open commands (open/xdg-open/start) targeting local HTML files or localhost URLs to prevent unexpected focus-steals during HTML development. Defaults to true.

auto_resize.description: Automatically resize images that exceed limits before sending to the model (default: true)

max_base64_bytes.description: Maximum image size in base64 bytes (default: 5242880 = 5MiB)

openTelemetry.description: Enable OpenTelemetry spans for AI SDK calls (using the 'experimental_telemetry' flag)

primary_tools.description: Tools that should only be available to primary agents.

continue_loop_on_deny.description: Continue the agent loop when a tool call is denied

mcp_timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for model context protocol (MCP) requests

autonomous_escalate_low_confidence.description: When autonomous mode auto-answers a clarification question with low confidence, escalate to the user instead of guessing. Default: true.

autonomous_strict_permission.description: When autonomous mode encounters a permission whose risk class is unknown, prompt instead of auto-approving. Default: true. Set false only to preserve legacy compatibility.

autonomous_caps.description: Override the default autonomous-mode blast-radius caps. Any field omitted falls back to the constant default.

perTool.description: Per-tool call-count caps. 0 or negative disables the cap for that tool. Tools not listed are unrestricted at the per-tool layer.

planner_architect_model.description: Provider/model id used for plan generation and replanning when set; defaults to the executor model.

critic_enabled.description: Run the autonomous-mode diff critic at every phase boundary. Default: false.

modes.description: Execution modes: local, cloud, hybrid placement, multi-provider council, and arena ensemble (ADR-049).

default.description: Default execution mode. When unset: hybrid if local AX Engine is available, else cloud. Arena/council are typically invoked via tools rather than as the global default.

preferLocalWhenAvailable.description: Prefer local placement when AX Engine (or configured local) is available. Default: true.

escalateOnHighComplexity.description: Route high-complexity work to cloud when hybrid is active. Default: true.

localProviderID.description: Provider id treated as local for hybrid placement. Default: ax-engine.

enabled.description: Allow the council multi-provider advisory tool. Default: true.

maxMembers.description: Maximum council members per invocation (default: 3, hard max: 6).

timeoutMs.description: Per-member timeout in ms for council fan-out (default: 60000).

debateRounds.description: Optional multi-round anonymous debate rounds (default: 0; Phase 3+).

enabled.description: Enable arena multi-contestant mode tools. Default: false until Phase 2.

timeoutMs.description: Per-member timeout in ms for arena fan-out (falls back to council timeout, then 60000).

strategy.description: Ranking strategy for arena candidates. verify_first is the recommended default (never pure popularity).

maxEstimatedUsd.description: Maximum estimated USD for an ensemble fan-out (fail-closed when exceeded).

estimatedUsdPerMember.description: Rough USD cost per council/arena member call used with maxEstimatedUsd to cap fan-out size.

wiki.description: Native source-backed AX Wiki. Complements structural ax-code index; does not replace code_intelligence.

enabled.description: When true (default), inject <repo_wiki> system protocol if the wiki directory exists. Set false to suppress.

dir.description: AX Wiki directory relative to project root. Default: ax-wiki.

model.description: Model used for wiki compilation as provider/model. Defaults to the AX Code model.

autoInjectAgents.description: Allow wiki ensure-agents / init --wiki to rewrite AX-WIKI marker blocks. Default: true.

touchClaudeMd.description: When ensuring markers, also update CLAUDE.md if it already exists. Default: true.

include.description: Optional source glob allowlist for AX Wiki discovery.

exclude.description: Additional source globs excluded from AX Wiki discovery.

maxSourcesPerPage.description: Maximum evidence files selected per page.

maxSourceBytes.description: Maximum bytes read from one source file.

maxPageSourceBytes.description: Maximum combined source evidence bytes per page.

instructions.description: Additional maintainer instructions applied during wiki compilation.

pages.description: Optional explicit wiki page plan; must include quickstart.md.

startCommand.description: Additional startup script to run after the project's start command
